creator: einar@isnic.is
text:
Seen on two seperate hosts, both running 13.2-RELEASE.
Worked on 2.7.9, but after upgrade to 2.8.1 our logs get flooded with:

[04/Jul/2023:16:38:21.761] local-https/2: SSL handshake failure

Reverting back to 2.7.9 fixes it.

Tried both on 13.2-RELEASE and 13.2-RELEASE p1, same results
